<!-- Thanks for contributing! Please fill this in so reviews go quickly. -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change do, and what problem does it solve? Link any issue: "Closes #123". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Docs / examples only
- [ ] Chore / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm check` passes (lint + format + typecheck + test)
- [ ] Added/updated tests where it makes sense
- [ ] Added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`) if a published package changed
- [ ] Updated docs / README if behaviour or the API changed

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything tricky, screenshots/GIFs for UI changes, or follow-ups. -->
